name: tally
description: Reads Tally.so forms, form-scoped submissions, webhooks, and workspaces, and writes form/webhook/workspace mutations through the Tally REST API.

risk.read: external Tally API read of form definitions, submission responses, webhook configuration, and workspace membership
risk.write: external Tally API mutation (form/webhook/workspace create-update-delete, submission delete)
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
